nodes.label: AI as time-saving analytical tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI can save an enormous amount of time, especially when dealing with sophisticated numerical analyses

nodes.label: AI reliability in statistical analysis
nodes.grounding_span: Without verification could be risky, as wrong result will not just be time consuming but will also make us question everything

nodes.label: AI capability in literature search
nodes.label_negative: AI inadequacy in literature search due to paywalls and hallucinations
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not yet fully capable of such work, due to paywall restrictions, evaluation of literature for unreported molecules and sometimes provide hallucinated results

nodes.label: AI as ideation and route design partner
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to execution without innovation
nodes.grounding_span: I would hope that AI can do literature search and also learn from existing literatures, but also come with a bit of innovation in terms of route design for novel molecule synthesis

nodes.label: Research efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI saves a lot of time since we can provide it with a list of suppliers and their website and the AI does the rest of searching and cost estimation

nodes.label: Experimental reliability and trust in results
nodes.grounding_span: Without verification could be risky, as wrong result will not just be time consuming but will also make us question everything

nodes.label: Scientific innovation and novel synthesis
nodes.grounding_span: it would be nice to provide AI with a starting material and a target molecule, it would spew out the synthetic route of it

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for time-consuming tasks
nodes.grounding_span: We are always trying to integrate AI into our work flow because it can save an enormous amount of time

nodes.label: Cautious stance on unverified AI statistical analysis
nodes.grounding_span: Without verification could be risky, as wrong result will not just be time consuming but will also make us question everything

nodes.label: Avoidance of AI for literature search
nodes.grounding_span: Literature search is one key area that we did not use AI at all, because based on our experience, AI is not yet fully capable of such work

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for AI in innovative route design
nodes.grounding_span: I would hope that AI can do literature search and also learn from existing literatures, but also come with a bit of innovation in terms of route design for novel molecule synthesis

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative ideation with AI
nodes.grounding_span: The work ideation were conversed extensively with AI prior to execution

nodes.label: Verification-oriented pragmatism
nodes.grounding_span: We do evaluate the ANOVA results AI provided using existing statistical software designed for these work
